candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows max conviction (100%) but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, the live directional signal has no historical analog and should be sized down, not up.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: A 15/30 bull / 0/30 bear reading on USDJPY looks maximally clean, but green_matches=0 means no prior instance of this exact indicator configuration has ever resolved profitably in the memory bank. Institutional flow that produces unanimous indicator agreement with no historical precedent is typically a late-stage momentum extension into a liquidity pocket — the consensus is measuring crowding, not edge. The conviction number captures agreement among indicators, not agreement with what historically paid.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier *= 0.5 (treat as unconfirmed; require library_match before full size)
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Reduces drawdown on false-confidence MOMENTUM entries; expected Sharpe +0.02-0.03 by cutting variance from high-conviction/zero-history trades like the current USDJPY 100% conv signal.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Current live state: USDJPY dir=LONG conv=100% but green_matches=0 hist_hr=0%; EURUSD conv=50% green_matches=0 hist_hr=0%; every pair shows hist_hr=0% despite conviction up to 100% — conviction is fully decoupled from historical hit rate right now.

reflection.system_health_note: Regime=UNKNOWN with TradingView showing 0 signals and internal MOMENTUM at 75% sizing — system is correctly de-risked, but zero closed trades in 7 days means all lessons remain harvest-inferred, not trade-validated.
